therapy.quote:
Chris is exactly the person I needed when starting therapy. He's able to strike the balance between being personable and incisive, and managed the ultimate goal of guiding me to make the big discoveries for myself.

Coming out of a breakdown related to childhood trauma, I required space, support, recognition and guidance. Chris provided all of these in spades, and ensured I felt secure throughout the healing process. There were lots of well-needed laughs, too. He embodies the healthy masculinity I am striving for.

I wouldn't be in the deep, meaningful relationship I am in now without Chris's help. I would wholeheartedly recommend him to anyone seeking therapy.
therapy.name: Joe T, 24

therapy.quote: This work has been genuinely life-changing. I'd never had therapy before and wasn't sure what to expect, but he made it feel easy to open up. He listened without judgement, challenged me when I needed it and helped me understand myself in a way I hadn't before.
therapy.name: Rob B, 34

speaking.quote: We found Chris to be insightful and completely different to what we usually see during our speaker events. His honesty opens up the room to an engaging and open discussion around how we can solve these issues going forward.
speaking.name: Barclays

speaking.quote: Honest, thought-provoking and very engaging. Chris helped us realise how men have a huge responsibility in the journey towards gender equality, and we all have so much to gain from broadening the definition of masculinity in the future.
speaking.name: L'Oréal

speaking.quote: Chris is a regular speaker at our business conferences and we couldn't recommend him highly enough. His ability to be both engaging and challenging often creates lively debates and further discussion amongst our delegates both during and after his session.
speaking.name: HFM Events
